jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cello
jsonLd.description:
We at Cello are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cello:
Cello is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello!
